content.en:
"Putting aside the matter of condensing the twelfth Eternal Realm Spirit for the time being, it will take too long. "

Ye Tian is now exploring as many places as possible, after all, when the extradimensional storm comes, many treasure lands will be destroyed, and those resources will also be turned into ashes.

Therefore, he must take all those resources before the extradimensional storm.

Moreover, his cultivation has broken through, and his strength has increased a lot, and there are just some treasures that he couldn't set foot in before, so he can give it a try now.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian broke into the Death Void and treasured or dangerous places to explore and collect all kinds of resources.

And his copy body still falls often, but the loss is not large, and the gain is still far more than the loss.

In the past more than one million Dao eras, his wife, sons, and daughters have all broken through, condensing the eleventh eternal realm spirit, and the human race has given birth to some peak "Nine Eighty-Three" peak realm gods.

It can be said that in terms of the number of peak realm gods, the human race has already surpassed the Taihao Heavenly Palace.

This terrifying growth rate has terrified many supreme forces.

However, the human race had grown up, and Ye Tian's strength had also made many supreme forces fearful.

Therefore, those supreme forces will not invade the human race at this juncture, otherwise they may all suffer heavy losses.

After the strength of the human race was strong and he was not afraid of other supreme forces, Ye Tian had no scruples and passed on the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed.

Of course, the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed can only be passed on nine times, he has already passed it on four times, and the remaining five times must be given to the right person.

In addition, he had already placed the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance in the Terran Temple, and every Terran Realm God could choose the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit.

Not only that, Ye Tian also tried to create other Perfect Eternal Dao Species, and after spending a long time, he finally created several Perfect Eternal Dao Inheritances.

In this way, the future human race will give birth to many perfect eternal Dao realm gods.

this day.

When Ye Tian was exploring a dangerous place in the Death Void, he found a mysterious treasure.

It was a shard of stone, like a shard of a stone stick.

But it doesn't look like a fragment of a superdimensional treasure, but more like a fragment of an extradimensional thing, because it is permeated with the aura of an extradimensional thing.

In the vicinity of this fragment of extradimensional things, there is a race of extradimensional beings.

In the past, Ye Tian couldn't help these extradimensional creatures.

But now, his cultivation has broken through, his strength has increased by a cut, and at a heavy price, he may have the hope of capturing this fragment.

As a result, one of his replica bodies invaded and used a large number of super dimensional secret treasures.

After a long period of killing, I don't know how many replica bodies have been sacrificed.

Eventually, he consumed the extradimensional creatures and seized the fragment.

Once he had obtained the fragment, he began researching and attempting to fuse the fragment of an extradimensional object.

As a result, one tried to fuse, and directly exploded and died.

This extradimensional object fragment is not like an ordinary extradimensional thing, and its extradimensional power and quality have surpassed that of the medium extradimensional thing Kunjie wood fragment.

"Could it be a fragment of something higher than that?"

Ye Tian guessed in his heart.

If that's the case, it's incredibly difficult to fuse it.

He now knows a lot about extradimensional knowledge, and it is extremely difficult for the peak realm gods to fuse low-level extra-dimensional things, and it is even more difficult to fuse medium-level extra-dimensional things.

Like the pinnacle realm gods of other supreme forces, they didn't dare to fuse medium extradimensional things at all, and if they failed to fuse, they would be killed.

And the probability of fusing a high-level extradimensional thing, even if it is a fragment, is almost equal to zero.

Ye Tian was just a peak realm god, and if he wanted to fuse a high-level super-dimensional thing, how difficult it was.

However, once the fusion is successful, his strength will also skyrocket.

"The fragment of a high-level extra-dimensional thing is very valuable, I didn't expect to be able to entertain a fragment of a high-level extra-dimensional thing, I must try to fuse!"

Ye Tian began to try again and again.

......

In the blink of an eye, more than a million years have passed.

At this time, the invasion of the Ice Ghost Organization is imminent.

And Ye Tian finally succeeded in fusing on this day after such a long time.

Rumble!!!!!

The power of the higher extradimensional things turned into threads of light and wrapped around them, and their terrifying coercion far exceeded them.

At this time, he also knew the name of this extradimensional thing.

Real Inscriptions!

This is the name of something higher than that.

And after Ye Tian fused the true inscription stone fragments, he could also use the power of this high-level extradimensional thing.

The extra-dimensional power of the higher extra-dimensional things is closer to the real extra-dimensional power. []

However, once you master the true extradimensional power, even if it is a trace of extradimensional power, it is also the superdimensional power that crushes the true inscription stone0 .....

After all, only by truly controlling the power of the extra-dimensional power can the power of the extra-dimensional power be exerted, and the extra-dimensional power can also be infinitely compressed, and the strength of the extra-dimensional power is far from being comparable to these extra-dimensional things.

The main characteristics of the true inscription stone are suppression and strength, which is naturally very helpful for attack power.

So, he next studied the extradimensional technique of the True Inscription Stone.

And this is not too difficult for him, it only took him a while to create two extradimensional techniques suitable for combat.

True Luminous Domain!

True Ming Aurora!

One is a domain-like extra-dimensional technique, and the other is an attack-type extra-dimensional technique.

It can be said that his current strength has far surpassed the past.

"Now, my strength has definitely surpassed the six Supreme Realm Gods such as the Liangyi Realm Gods!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

......

Meanwhile.

Xuandong Mountain has already set up a formation and is in contact with the Ice Ghost Organization.

"Let's get started!"

They urged the formation, and the ice ghost organization on the other side also opened the formation.

Rumble!!!!!

The terrifying fluctuations spread in an instant, illuminating many areas.

The radiation range of this strong fluctuation was too wide, and it even affected this side of the Realm God Realm.

You must know that they are arranging formations in the Death Void, but they affect such a vast territory.

"It's not good, the gods of the Liangyi Realm, they definitely found it!" The six cave realm gods changed their faces in 4.8 colors.

At this time, the formation was no longer controlled by them, it was already controlled by the Ice Ghost Organization at the other end, and it was not something they could stop if they wanted to.

Rumble!!!!

The gods of the Liangyi Realm and other peak realm gods used the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure to spy here.

Soon, they discovered the Six Cave Realm Gods and this formation.

"Six Cave Realm God, Xuanlong Realm God, what are you doing?"

The gods of the two ritual realms are questioning.

However, due to the distance, they could not get here for a while, so they could only ask questions by projection.

The gods of the Liangyi Realm took a deep breath, and now that they are exposed, they will be exposed.

Just wait for the Ice Ghost Organization to arrive and start with the Ice Ghost Organization, and when the time comes, you can take away as many realm gods as you can from Xuandong Mountain, and as for the other realm gods, you can only sacrifice.
